note: For every scenario the support-bundle plaintext preserves the full semantic digest and the CLI / headless index preserves the coarse digest of the product UI record, so support can explain maintenance / failover outcomes without rehydrating live control-plane state. Regenerate with `ci/check_maintenance_failover_corpus.py --write`.
